releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features

**Custom Title Generation**:

- Smart title generation based on document content
- Customizable prompts for title generation

**Custom Time Metadata**:

- Document creation and update time tracking
- Customizable time format settings

**Auto Category Selection**:

- Automatic category suggestion and selection feature

**Custom Metadata Fields**:

- Support for user-defined metadata fields
